message:
fix(guard): correct jitter-range values in doc comment

The doc comment after the jitter formula listed the wrong ranges for
base=400 and base=1600: [275, 475) and [1100, 1900). Those values come
from an older draft; the actual formula produces:

    base=100:  span=50,  low=75   → [75,   125)
    base=400:  span=200, low=300  → [300,  500)
    base=1600: span=800, low=1200 → [1200, 2000)

No behavior change — just correcting the comment so readers don't get
misled about the retry cadence.
